  Log:
  matwm2 is a simple window manager for x11.
  It aims to be small, fast, stable and usable
  
  WWW: http://www.gatorgitter.com/~maties/
  
  PR:             138643
  Submitted by:   Mattis Michel <sic_zer0@hotmail.com>
